main.description: Mint a long-lived, scope-limited API key for the group. Owner-only. The plaintext key is returned exactly once and never retrievable again.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the target group. Optional during the #27 deprecation window: omit it and the group is taken from the (deprecated) JWT aud claim instead.

name.description: Human-readable label for the key (e.g. 'platform backend').

scopes.description: Granted scope strings (@atproto/oauth-scopes rpc: form). First supported scope: rpc:app.certified.group.member.list.

keyRef.description: Non-secret key id; the stable handle for keys.list / keys.delete.

key.description: The full plaintext key (cgsk_<keyRef>.<secret>). Returned only here, never again.
